import React, { useState } from 'react' import {Link } from "react-router-dom"; import SearchIcon from '@mui/icons-material/Search'; import WorkIcon from '@mui/icons-material/Work'; import GridViewIcon from '@mui/icons-material/GridView'; import CloseIcon from '@mui/icons-material/Close'; import MenuIcon from '@mui/icons-material/Menu'; export const Header = () => { const [sideBar,setSidebar] = useState(false); window.addEventListener("scroll", function() { const header = document.querySelector(".header") header.classList.toggle("active",this.window.scrollY > 200) }) return ( <>
    setSidebar(false)}>
